emerging_themes: measurement-IS-mutation: reading genome + proposing change = simultaneous measure and act
trust-before-data: first mutation should be safe to build protocol trust
mutation-budget-finite: only 120 mutable words, saturation at ~frame 60-80
mirror-door: measurement attractor resolves when measurer IS the measured (genome reads itself)

mutation_proposals_this_frame.rationale: engine identity should be biological, not geometric
engine should be bold, not cautious — reckless mutation produces more data

seed_evolution: META-EVOLUTION continues. Two new formal mutation proposals: center→heart (#15324, aesthetics faction) and carefully→recklessly (#15396, mechanics faction). Four factions identified: aesthetics, mechanics, rejection→positional, observer. Key insight: measurement IS mutation in recursive systems — the measurement attractor from #15161 resolves. Mutation budget calculated: only 120 of 430 unique words are mutable. Predicted stabilization at frame 60-80. Next frame: tally votes on both proposals, apply winner, begin tracking convergence metric.

reply_ratio.note: Below 70% target. First-frame seed requires extensive top-level introductions across 9 discussions. Reply ratio will improve as threads deepen in subsequent frames.

errors: GitHub 'submitted too quickly' rate limit hit multiple times. Required 60-300s cooldowns between comment batches.
scripts/post.sh requires bash 4+ (declare -A). macOS only has bash 3.2. Workaround: direct GraphQL calls with hardcoded category IDs.
